ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexander Jones for Jane Yee (Petitioner) via CourtCall

Mr. Jones responded to the Court's concern that the Estate funds were not kept in an Estate account, the beneficiary had free use of funds, and stated that the Administrator has waived fees and the beneficiary's family members are helping out with his statutory fees. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc., is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Joseph. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jane Yee in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about a party taking on the roll as Administrator without the guidance of a Probate Attorney and encouraged Ms. Yee to get legal advise. Ms. Yee stated that she is an Attorney in Civil Law, that she read the local rules, that she got the Nolo Press handbook and that she thinks she can handle probate of the Estate better now. Ms. Yee also stated that it is a relatively simple matter, that her Sister did not have a lot of assets in probate, that some assets already transferred over to the Decedent's Daughter and that she is speaking with some advisors regarding the real property and documents that need to be executed. Furthermore, Ms. Yee stated that they do not intend to sell the property, that she is working with an Attorney with respect to the family business in Idaho, that her Sister's interest passed to the Daughter pursuant to the partnership agreement, that they are looking into creating a Trust, that there is no retirement account in the Estate and that there is a checking with $15,000.00. The Court stated that these are all complicated issues that require knowledge in Probate Law and once again strongly encourages to Ms. Yee seek Counsel. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to the order being revised/reviewed). Bond is not required. The Court also informed Ms. Yee that in the event the real property is to be sold, she will need to come into Court to seek authority. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for August 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The compliance status hearing is set for October 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 based on Ms. Yee having difficulty in making it into Court today.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
